identity.name: Rhino Drishti
identity.target_audience: Armed Forces, Intelligence Analysts, Strategic Planners

colors.theme_strategy: Dark Mode Default with Light Mode Toggle

usage_rules.text: Off-white (#e2e8f0) for body, Terminal Green (#a3e635) for active states/highlights.
usage_rules.borders: Thin, sharp 1px borders in dark olive gray (#2d372b).
usage_rules.alerts: Signal Red for critical, Amber for warning, Terminal Green for safe.
usage_rules.gradients: Avoid gradients unless simulating 'scanlines' or 'radar' effects.

visual_enhancers.borders: Sharp corners (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Use 1px borders everywhere.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal ambient shadows. Use 'glow' effects for active elements (e.g., box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(163, 230, 53, 0.2)).
visual_enhancers.textures: Optional: subtle 'scanline' overlay or 'grid' pattern on backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.animations: Instant transitions (duration-75 or duration-100). No bouncy springs. 'Tech' ease-out.

layout_strategy.sidebar: Collapsible vertical navigation on the left (w-16 to w-64).
layout_strategy.dashboard_grid: Grid with 12 columns. Map takes 6-8 cols. Feed takes 4 cols. Stats take top row.
layout_strategy.mobile: Stack vertically. Sidebar becomes bottom sheet or drawer.

customizations.style: bg-card border-border border-l-4 border-l-primary rounded-none shadow-none
rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px] px-2 py-0.5 border

map_visualization.instructions: Use 'react-simple-maps' to render the NER region. Highlight Assam, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Tripura. Add markers for incidents. Use 'd3-scale' for color coding choropleth maps if needed.
map_visualization.data_source: Use a topojson file for India/NER. If unavailable, use a placeholder SVG or fetch from a public URL like 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/deldersveld/topojson/master/countries/india/india-states.json' and filter for NER states.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update '/app/frontend/src/index.css' with the provided CSS variables for the Tactical Olive theme.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create a 'Layout' component that includes the sidebar and top bar.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the 'Dashboard' page with the Bento grid layout using the 'Card' components.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Map component using 'react-simple-maps'. Handle loading states gracefully.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure all text contrast meets WCAG AA standards (especially green on black).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors or subtle textures.
Avoid rounded corners > 4px. Prefer sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Use uppercase text for labels, headers, and buttons to enhance the 'military' feel.
Feedback is instant. Avoid long animations.
Charts should use the theme colors: Primary (Green), Destructive (Red), Warning (Amber), Info (Blue).
Always check for accessibility. Green text on black must be readable.
